title: Lock & Lock Classics Rectangular Food Container with Leak Proof Locking Lid, 180ml (110 x 90 x 48mm)
features: Food stays fresher for longer than normal resulting in mush less being thrown away
Stackable design can create up to 40% more usable space in fridges, freezers and cupboards
Safe for use in freezer, microwave and dishwasher (top rack).
description: From the manufacturer Lock and Lock - Easy Essentials Food Storage Smart storage made easy. Fresh foods have never had it so good. With a smart mix of container shapes and sizes for a variety of storage needs, Easy Essentials storage containers are perfect for snacks, dry ingredients, sauces, leftovers and more. These food storage containers are ideal for getting the refrigerator and kitchen organized or for bringing extra ingredients or side dishes on the go. BPA free plastic Wide range of shapes and sizes 4-hinge locking lids or easy twist lids Airtight containers, leakproof and durable for up to 3 million uses Dishwasher safe, microwave safe, and freezer safe Explore Collections - On the Go Meals Enjoy meals wherever you are with storage containers perfect for lunch and meal prep with the On the Go Meals collection. Divided containers with compartments make it especially easy to separate snacks, sides, and entrees. Explore Collections - Color Mates Keep things organized with the Color Mates collection's easy color matching system for pairing lids with containers - each container has a color dot on the bottom so you know which color lid to use. Explore Collections - Specialty The Specialty collection offers an easy way to store specific ingredients, appetizers, salads and other specific specialty items. Explore Collections - Pantry Choose the Pantry collection for essential containers for pantry organization and kitchen organization. Airtight containers are great for storing bulk goods - like rice, flour, sugar, and pasta - plus snacks and more. On the Go Meals Color Mates Specialty Pantry
